case_title: HAMID BAREKAT VS. KURT COLLINS et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAREKAT, HAMID AS TO DEFENDANT COLLINS, KURT DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
